creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Fri Dec 20 17:28:40 2013
New Revision: 337049
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/337049

Log:
  devel/gsoap: make debug builds C++11 compatible
  
  PR:		ports/183905
  Submitted by:	Michael Gmelin <freebsd grem.de>
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout)

Modified:
  head/devel/gsoap/Makefile
  head/devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap-stdsoap2.h

Modified: head/devel/gsoap/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gsoap/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 17:27:25 2013	(r337048)
+++ head/devel/gsoap/Makefile	Fri Dec 20 17:28:40 2013	(r337049)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	gsoap
 PORTVERSION=	2.8.10
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}2/gSOAP
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}

Modified: head/devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap-stdsoap2.h
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap-stdsoap2.h	Fri Dec 20 17:27:25 2013	(r337048)
+++ head/devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap-stdsoap2.h	Fri Dec 20 17:28:40 2013	(r337049)
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 --- gsoap/stdsoap2.h.orig	2008-01-27 22:02:36.000000000 +0100
 +++ gsoap/stdsoap2.h	2008-07-04 12:35:55.000000000 +0200
-@@ -292,9 +292,6 @@
+@@ -314,9 +314,6 @@
  #  define HAVE_STRRCHR
  #  define HAVE_STRTOD
  #  define HAVE_SSCANF
@@ -10,3 +10,16 @@
  #  define HAVE_STRTOL
  #  define HAVE_STRTOUL
  #  define HAVE_STRTOLL
+@@ -1462,9 +1465,9 @@
+ # endif
+ # ifndef DBGFUN
+ #  define DBGFUN(FNAME) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s()\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME))
+-#  define DBGFUN1(FNAME, FMT, ARG) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s("FMT")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG)))
+-#  define DBGFUN2(FNAME, FMT1, ARG1, FMT2, ARG2) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s("FMT1", "FMT2")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG1), (ARG2)))
+-#  define DBGFUN3(FNAME, FMT1, ARG1, FMT2, ARG2, FMT3, ARG3) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s("FMT1", "FMT2", "FMT3")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG1), (ARG2), (ARG3)))
++#  define DBGFUN1(FNAME, FMT, ARG) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s(" FMT ")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG)))
++#  define DBGFUN2(FNAME, FMT1, ARG1, FMT2, ARG2) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s(" FMT1 ", " FMT2 ")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG1), (ARG2)))
++#  define DBGFUN3(FNAME, FMT1, ARG1, FMT2, ARG2, FMT3, ARG3) DBGLOG(TEST, SOAP_MESSAGE(fdebug, "%s(%d): %s(" FMT1 ", " FMT2 ", " FMT3 ")\n", __FILE__, __LINE__, FNAME, (ARG1), (ARG2), (ARG3)))
+ # endif
+ # ifndef DBGHEX
+ #  define DBGHEX(DBGFILE, MSG, LEN) \
